title: Byers Gill Solar: development consent order, Planning Act 2008
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State on an application by RWE Renewables UK Solar and Storage Limited for the construction, operation, maintenance, and decommissioning of a ground mounted solar PV onshore generating station on an area of approximately 490 hectares of land, along with an on-site Battery Energy Storage System, associated infrastructure, and underground cable connections between panel areas to connect to the existing National Grid substation at Norton.  Date  23 July 2025  Company / Location   RWE Renewables UK Solar and Storage LimitedWindmill Hill Business Park Swindon Wiltshire SN5 6PB   Minimum output:  180 MW  "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
